system.description:
*hand*, *crude*, *magical*

A blade of knapped quartz, with the hilt wrapped in glyph-covered leather. It gleams to those with the forest eyes.

When you **_wield the crystal knife as a_** **_weapon_**, you can harm the manifest form of any spirit, ignoring armor and dealing +1d4 damage. If the 1d4 comes up a 4, though, the knife shatters into useless shards.

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.GaDYK1VEJEi6tHDa]{Forest Folk}.*
